summary: Backend-only tests for Famrak upgrade (privacy consent + join-request approval + sharing on/off + remove/leave/delete). Rewrote /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py with 36 pytest tests targeting the public preview URL. 36/36 PASSED. All new endpoints verified: consent-gated register, pending join flow, owner-only approve/reject, my-request/cancel, sharing toggle (blocks /location/update, filters /location/family, forbids history of sharing-off member, self still visible), remove-member matrix (owner-removes, member-self-leave, non-owner forbidden 403, owner-self 400), clear location history, delete account (invalidates token, owner disbands family and unlinks members).

minor.issue: Returns literal 'null' (JSON null) when no pending request. Frontend must handle null (not empty object). Consider 204 No Content or {} for consistency, but current contract is documented and tests handle it.
Duplicates DELETE /api/family/members/{self_id} behavior but does not purge locations/history/geofence like remove does. Consider unifying via the remove endpoint or purging on leave too.
Broadcasts to family_id or empty-string room when user has no family; broadcast to '' is a no-op but is a minor code smell. Guard with `if user.get('family_id')`.

action_items: None required — all requested behaviors pass. Optional: consolidate /family/leave with /family/members/{self} purge logic for consistency.
Optional: guard PUT /user/sharing broadcast when user has no family_id (avoid broadcasting to empty room key).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~950 lines and now includes AUTH, FAMILY, JOIN-REQUESTS, PRIVACY/ACCOUNT, LOCATION, PLACES, CHAT, CHECK-IN, SOS and WS in a single module. Recommend splitting into routers/ modules soon.
approve_join_request eagerly rejects when requester is already in another family (good). Consider also expiring old pending requests when a user is approved elsewhere.
remove_family_member correctly purges locations/history/geofence for the removed user; /family/leave does NOT (inconsistency).
GET /family/my-request returns Optional[JoinRequest]; response_model=Optional[JoinRequest] serializes None as JSON `null` (verified). Frontend must handle null.
@app.on_event('shutdown') still deprecated; migrate to FastAPI lifespan.
PUT /user/sharing broadcasts sharing_on with family_id='' fallback — minor code smell.
seed_data_creation: Per-run TEST_ prefixed users at @famrak-test.example.com plus one TEST Family <RUN_ID>. Owner (A) and outsider (C) accounts are deleted at end of run by the delete-account tests; member (B) persists but is unlinked from any family. Password: secret123.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public base URL: https://2f0b134a-c115-4c23-831f-cd32c188338c.preview.emergentagent.com. Use pydantic-compatible EmailStr domains (.example.com, NOT .test). Register now requires consent:true (default False -> 400). Join flow: POST /family/join returns {status:'pending', request_id}; owner must POST /family/join-requests/{id}/approve. GET /family/my-request returns JSON null (not {}). Sharing off deletes latest location and hides user from /location/family (self always visible to self); /location/history/{other} returns 403 when target sharing_enabled=false. DELETE /family/members/{id}: owner-removes-others=200, member-self=200, non-owner-others=403, owner-self=400. DELETE /user/account disbands family if user is owner and cascades to places/messages/checkins/sos/join_requests/locations/history. To rerun: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v (uses uuid RUN_ID each run, idempotent).
rca_of_issue: N/A - no bugs found. All 15 requested behaviors verified passing.
